faq.question: Can I display a catalog of cosmetology procedures on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, a catalog with procedure descriptions, indications, contraindications, and prices is easily added to the website.

faq.question: How will clients book appointments?
faq.answer: Built-in booking form allows selecting procedure, doctor, and convenient time — request comes to you.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a cosmetology clinic with multiple specialists?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add profiles of cosmetic doctors with their specializations, education, and experience.

faq.question: Will the cosmetology clinic appear in search results?
faq.answer: Yes, websites are SEO-optimized — the clinic will appear in city and services search results.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a cosmetology website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Can I add before and after procedure photos?
faq.answer: Yes, the gallery allows showing work examples and results of cosmetology procedures.
